# Handoff Rules

## To implementation-handoff-desk

Use when observability gaps require code, config, tests, dashboard-as-code, or CI changes. Include exact files, expected signal changes, validation commands, and halt conditions.

## To deployment-desk

Use when the next step is rollout control, feature flags, staged deployment, or go/no-go monitoring checkpoints.

## To release-operations-desk

Use when observability evidence must be included in release readiness, release notes, rollback plans, or post-release verification.

## To incident-response-desk

Use when the issue is active production impact, RCA, severity classification, mitigation, or incident follow-up.

## To verification-desk

Use when observability requirements must be traced to acceptance criteria and test evidence.
